violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in the food prep areas noted in need of cleaning under and around in place equipment.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Portable fan and fan guards reachin cooler interiors and exteriors and other equipment exteriors noted not clean
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the flour and rice bins in the back dry storage.
LIGHTING (1 pts): The lights noted not shielded in food prep area and back storage area.

PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung. | PREMISES (1 pts): Lockers or other suitable storage facilities noted not provided or used for the storage of personal belongings. Don not hang coats and other personal items on food racks or in food prep areas.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room door noted not self closing.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.
LIGHTING (1 pts): The lights noted not shielded in food prep areas.
